carry_casting_bundle.query: a worker carries a connected bundle of silver cast-metal parts by hand from the work table toward a wooden crate
carry_casting_bundle.prompt:
Event: a worker carries a connected bundle of silver cast-metal parts by hand from the work table toward a wooden crate
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

put_casting_into_crate.query: a worker lowers the connected silver casting into the wooden crate directly in front of him
